top_findings.title: Acceptance tests are not isolated — share a persistent on-disk DB, suite is non-repeatable
top_findings.evidence: integration_test.go:107 asserts assert.Len(t, books, 1) for author 'Author A', but tests open the shared file ./books.db (database.go:19 sql.Open("sqlite3","./books.db")) with no reset/cleanup; the archived books.db is non-empty, so a second `go test` run accumulates rows and this assertion fails. main_test.go 'List Books' also depends on the prior 'Create Book' subtest.
top_findings.suggestion: Use a fresh temp/in-memory DB per test (e.g. an initDB variant taking a DSN, or t.TempDir()); the ATDD prompt requires each scenario to start from an empty service and share no data.
